title: Hemorrhoids Got You Down? 9 Herbal Creams for Long Distance Cyclists
description: Symphytum officinale creams are a popular herbal remedy for hemorrhoids. The cream contains allantoin, a compound that helps to reduce inflammation and promote healing in the affected area. It also has a soothing effect on the skin, providing relief from itching and discomfort. The active constituents in the cream, including rosmarinic acid and ursolic acid, have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that aid in reducing swelling and promoting tissue repair.
